name: xefig-desktop
description: nw.js wrapper around the Xefig web build for Steam distribution
//inject_js_end: Runs in every loaded page after DOM ready. The shim eagerly swaps the launcher's to data-full-url, because in the desktop offline build the full image is always already on disk and there's no bandwidth reason to be lazy about it.
//greenworks: Steam SDK bindings (greenworks) are installed by a separate one-time setup step — see apps/desktop/README.md. They require a native build against the unzipped Steamworks SDK, so they're kept out of normal npm install.
